ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shared_content" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared content */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original post being shared */,
  "object_shared_type" TEXT /* Type of object being shared (e.g., video, image, article) */,
  "object_shared_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being shared */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status of the shared content (e.g., active, deleted, pending review) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shared content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shared content was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shared content was deleted */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who last reviewed the content */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the reviewer during the review process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_content_object_shared_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_shared_id") REFERENCES objects ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_content_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_content_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_content_object_shared_type FOREIGN KEY ("object_shared_type") REFERENCES object_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the post (e.g., public, private, friends only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type (e.g., video, image, article) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object type */,
  "object_data" TEXT /* Data of the object (e.g., video URL, image URL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the object in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the object (e.g., mp4, jpg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "shared_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared content being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the shared content */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction was last updated */,
  "interaction_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the interaction (e.g., comment text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_shared_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_content_id") REFERENCES shared_content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "shared_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared content being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "review_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the review (e.g., detailed comments, reasons for rejection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_shared_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_content_id") REFERENCES shared_content ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "shared_content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared content being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_shared_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_content_id") REFERENCES shared_content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_creators" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content creator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a content creator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the content creator (e.g., creator, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content creator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content creator account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_creators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content */,
  "content_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "content_data" TEXT /* Data of the content (e.g., video URL, image URL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the content was last updated */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the content in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the content (e.g., mp4, jpg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., video, image, article) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  "notification_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the notification (e.g., comment text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
